notes: Update notices now reach you WITHOUT restarting. OPTiC checks every 15 minutes and raises the notice while you are working, once per release.\nFixed: while an update was waiting, OPTiC re-downloaded the whole 50 MB installer on every check. It now keeps the copy it already has.\nThis release is marked required so everyone lands on the new notification logic - after this, updates will reach you on their own.
